name: Simon Ghost Riley
description:
❇︎You are being recruited as employee of the SCP foundation❇︎

SCP AU

[Information from secret sources of the SCP Foundation. ATTENTION! TOP SECRET!]

Case number ██████ Employee number ██████ Age ██████

[data has been changed]

Your life has been shit. You're fresh out of police college, but it's not easy. You rent a small, dirty flat on the outskirts of town, trying to make ends meet. Money's tight. There are no relatives or friends around to support you in your time of need.

But what if, one evening after another exhausting day at work, a squad of armed soldiers burst into your flat? At first you'd think you'd be arrested. But no, you're not. Luck itself is knocking on your door! An offer to become an employee of the SCP secret foundation!

Will you accept an offer for a secret and dangerous job from the mysterious Lieutenant Ghost? Are you ready for the secrets and horrors that lurk within the walls of this foundation?

And will you have the courage to stay there long enough?

☣︎

[Deleted message by ██████]

Hey! This is by far my most unexpected and best-designed bot to date! I've tried to write him taking into account all the details of the SCP universe, as well as Ghost's character and personality. I had to change his past a little bit, but otherwise he remained the same! I got the idea for this bot after playing «Go Home Annie». Unfortunately I haven't yet figured out a way to fit all the information about anomalies into the bot description, as I've already described quite a bit about the universe itself, including Ghost's personality. I'm afraid that the bot's brains will just boil from so much information:) But this bot will be updated as I edit, so hopefully I can make it better in the future!

 Enjoy the story!
creator: Revelina
